books.description: An open framework for formulating and implementing a strategy for software security across an organization.
Essential reading for sales engineers mapping technical product capabilities to enterprise Zero Trust requirements.
SANS guidelines on how organizations test security tools, crucial knowledge for engineers selling those solutions.
In-depth documentation for engineers supporting, configuring, and troubleshooting enterprise security environments.
Comprehensive manual for support engineers maintaining SIEM infrastructure and resolving alert ingestion issues.
